title: About - Justin Madders
meta_description: Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough
text_excerpt: About - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu About Following boundary changes at the 2024 General Election, I am now the MP for Ellesmere Port and Bromborough. I live in Little Sutton with my family and was for many years before my election a local councillor in Ellesmere Port. Before entering Parliament, I had a career in employment law, defending the rights of working people to be treated fairly and with dignity at work, I was first elected Labour MP for Ellesmere Port and Neston in May 2015. Working hard for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Justin Madders Contact details 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Email: justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sue Pugh on behalf of Justin Madders, both at 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, CH65 0AA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
